description: Canonical standards reference registry for the construction-kernel family. References standards by citation only — does not reproduce copyrighted standards text. All repos must reference standards through this registry.
non_duplication_posture: Standards text is never copied into any repo. Only citation references, relevance categories, and governing relationships are recorded.

standards.title: International Building Code
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Code requirements link to specification obligations and assembly compliance records.

standards.title: NFPA 285 — Standard Fire Test Method for Evaluation of Fire Propagation Characteristics of Exterior Wall Assemblies
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Test results link to assembly records and material compatibility.

standards.title: ASHRAE 90.1 — Energy Standard for Buildings Except Low-Rise Residential Buildings
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Thermal performance values link to assembly and material properties.

standards.title: Whole Building Design Guide
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Design guidance references link to best-practice intelligence.

standards.title: Unified Facilities Guide Specifications
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Federal spec requirements link to specification obligations.

standards.title: CSI MasterFormat — Numbers and Titles for the Construction Industry
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Section numbers classify all spec-domain truth.

standards.title: ASTM International Test Methods (various)
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Individual ASTM test methods link to material properties and specification requirements.

standards.title: American Architectural Manufacturers Association Methods (various)
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: AAMA methods link to fenestration and curtain wall performance.

standards.title: ISO 13788 — Hygrothermal performance of building components and building elements
standards.evidence_linkage_posture: Hygrothermal analysis links to material properties and assembly configurations.
